documentation.value:
The standard error output stream (unbuffered).

```cpp
std::cerr << "Error: " << msg << std::endl;
```

Inserts a newline character and flushes the stream.

```cpp
std::cout << "Hello" << std::endl;
```

**Note:** Prefer `'\n'` when flushing is not needed for better performance.

A lightweight non-owning reference to a string or substring. Zero-copy.

```cpp
std::string_view sv = "hello world";
auto sub = sv.substr(0, 5); // "hello"
void process(std::string_view s); // pass by value
```

Counts elements equal to a given value.

```cpp
std::vector<int> v = {1, 2, 2, 3, 2};
auto n = std::count(v.begin(), v.end(), 2); // 3
```

Counts elements for which the predicate returns true.

```cpp
std::vector<int> v = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};
auto n = std::count_if(v.begin(), v.end(), [](int x) { return x > 3; }); // 2
```

Checks if a value exists in a sorted range. O(log n).

```cpp
std::vector<int> v = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};
bool found = std::binary_search(v.begin(), v.end(), 3); // true
```

Exchanges the values of two objects.

```cpp
int a = 1, b = 2;
std::swap(a, b); // a=2, b=1
```

Creates a function object with some arguments bound.

```cpp
using namespace std::placeholders;
auto bound = std::bind(&MyClass::method, &obj, _1, 42);
bound(10); // calls obj.method(10, 42)
```

**Note:** Prefer lambdas over `std::bind` in modern C++.

Deduces the type of a variable from its initializer.

```cpp
auto x = 42;          // int
auto s = "hello"s;    // std::string
auto it = v.begin();  // iterator
auto [key, val] = pair; // structured bindings
```

Declares a generic template.

```cpp
template<typename T>
T max(T a, T b) { return (a > b) ? a : b; }

template<typename T, int N>
class FixedArray { T data[N]; };
```

Specifies a type template parameter or disambiguates dependent types.

```cpp
template<typename T>
void foo(T val);

typename Container::iterator it; // dependent name
```

Prevents further overriding of a virtual function or derivation from a class.

```cpp
class Base final { }; // no derived classes
void method() final; // no further override
```

Specifies static storage duration or class-level member.

```cpp
static int count = 0;        // file/function scope
class C { static int val; }; // shared across instances
```

Suggests inline expansion and allows multiple definitions across translation units.

```cpp
inline int square(int x) { return x * x; }
inline constexpr int val = 42; // inline variable (C++17)
```

Yields the type of an expression at compile time.

```cpp
int x = 42;
decltype(x) y = 10;   // int
decltype(auto) z = x; // int
```
